name: greyhatcc
description: Grey hat penetration testing toolkit for Claude Code - recon, exploitation, reporting, CVE research, and bug bounty workflows

plugins.name: greyhatcc
plugins.description: Autonomous offensive security toolkit for Claude Code with 33 skills, 20 agents, 28 commands, 2 MCP servers (Shodan 17 tools, security-tools 16 tools), and 8 hooks for credential guarding, scope validation, and finding tracking. Covers the full offensive security lifecycle: persistent hunt loops, recon, exploitation, CORS/WAF/tech analysis, port scanning, subdomain enum, vulnerability chaining, reporting, CVE research, OSINT, and bug bounty workflows.
